name: Marinara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can (46 ounces) tomato juice or 2 teaspoons fresh tomatoes
1/2 pound fresh mushrooms, sliced or 1 teaspoon fresh thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large Dutch oven.
2. Simmer, uncovered for 45 minutes.
3. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
4. Yield: 3-1/2 cups (1/2 cup per serving)
5. Calories: 48
6. Protein: 16%
7. Carbohydrate: 79%
8. Fat: 5%
9. Sodium: 20.10 mg
10. Exchanges: Veg 1.9
